$description: Component parameters — per-instance knobs, not design tokens. Each is emitted as BOTH a custom property and an @property registration, so the initial-value replaces the inline var() fallback it used to carry. $value may reference a design token; Style Dictionary resolves it before emission, which is the point: @property initial-value cannot contain var(), so hand-writing this block would hardcode a duplicate of the token's value and drift from it silently. Per design-system guidance, a value that is local to one component is a component parameter rather than a token; registering it here keeps it visible to stylelint instead of hiding behind a fallback.

skel-w.$description: Skeleton width, set per instance by Skeleton.tsx.

skel-h.$description: Skeleton height. Defaults to the sp-lg step; variants override.

skel-r.$description: Skeleton corner radius; the circle variant overrides with radius-full.

row-indent.$description: Tree-row indent, set per row by Table.tsx from the row depth.

toast-accent.$description: Toast edge accent; each severity class sets its own.

modal-w.$description: Modal width; the narrow variant overrides to 420px.
